text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, a letter from a fan arrives for Fine
Motion.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Excuse the intrusion, but please allow me to
confirm the letter's contents first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion's security captain suddenly appears
and promptly looks over the letter.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
I have confirmed that the letter poses no danger.
Pardon me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
choice_data_list:
That's an awful lot of effort just to receive a
single letter.

That's an awful lot of effort just to receive a
single letter.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I would love to unseal it myself, but you just
never know. I was raised to be cautious.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"Dear Fine Motion, watching you has given me
courage."

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"My parents told me that it was absurd for the
daughter of a prestigious family to race, so I was
about to give up on my dream—until I heard
about you."

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"I saw how dedicated you are to both racing and
your family's duties. I want to chase my dream just
like you."

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"I hope that one day we might meet on the turf.
Until then, I'll continue watching and cheering for
you."

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I was only running to fulfill my own dream—I
never imagined that my efforts could affect the
dreams of other people too.
choice_data_list: It'd be nice if you could run with her one day.
It'd be nice if you could run with her one day.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I hope we can clash at full strength in the most
incredible races as we continue ever onward down
our respective paths—laughing all the while.
choice_data_list: You're going to have to train to make it happen!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course! I'll do my very best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The heartfelt message of the fan letter provides
Fine Motion with a great boost of motivation.
